positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed celestial botanic wreath featuring interwoven lines of stylized lunar flora, glowing nebulous leaves, and crescent moons. The design should use a central composition, strong contrasting silhouettes against a negative space background. Style is elegant, vintage engraved illustration combined with bioluminescent watercolor accents. Color palette is restricted to deep indigo, soft gold, matte black, and hints of emerald green. Composition must be clean, scalable, and suitable for screen printing on apparel. High contrast, detailed linework, symmetrical balance, centered framing.
